case_title: HARVEY HACKER ARCHITECTS VS THE GRONER CORP.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HARVEY HACKER ARCHITECTS AS TO DEFENDANT THE GRONER CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-28-1999 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
